hooks.command: EDITED_FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" && case "$EDITED_FILE" in *.env*|*credentials*|*secrets*|*.pem|*.key|*.p12) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Sensitive file detected. Requires explicit user confirmation before writing."}' ;; */bitcoin_blockchain_dev/*) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"bitcoin_blockchain_dev/ is READ-ONLY reference material. DO NOT modify."}' ;; *rpc_credentials*) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"RPC credentials file must not be committed or overwritten by AI."}' ;; *) ;; esac

EDITED_FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" && case "$EDITED_FILE" in *wallet*|*keys*|*address*|*transaction*|*signer*) echo 'CRYPTO CODE EDITED: '"$EDITED_FILE" && echo '' && echo 'Before continuing, verify:' && echo '  1. No private keys logged or printed' && echo '  2. Entropy sources are secrets/os.urandom only' && echo '  3. No custom cryptography introduced' && echo '  4. Type annotations on all functions' && echo '  5. Known test vectors validate the operation' ;; *constants*) echo 'CONSTANTS FILE EDITED: '"$EDITED_FILE" && echo '' && echo 'Verify:' && echo '  1. Values match Bitcoin protocol specification' && echo '  2. Units and encoding documented' ;; */tests/*) echo 'TEST FILE EDITED: '"$EDITED_FILE" && echo '' && echo 'Verify:' && echo '  1. At least one test uses known Bitcoin test vectors' && echo '  2. No mocking of cryptographic operations' && echo '  3. Exact equality for deterministic crypto ops' ;; *) ;; esac

echo '=== SESSION END CHECK ===' && CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null) && STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null) && if [ -n "$CHANGED" ] || [ -n "$STAGED" ]; then echo 'UNCOMMITTED CHANGES DETECTED:' && echo "$CHANGED" && echo "$STAGED" && echo '' && DOCS_TOUCHED=false && echo "$CHANGED $STAGED" | grep -q 'docs/' && DOCS_TOUCHED=true; if [ "$DOCS_TOUCHED" = false ]; then echo 'WARNING: Files changed but docs/ not updated.' && echo 'Consider updating: status.md, versions.md'; fi; else echo 'No uncommitted changes.'; fi

echo '{"systemMessage":"SESSION END -- MEMORY REVIEW: Before this session closes, review what was learned and suggest memories the user may want to save. Check ~/.codex/memories/-Users-amrambouskila-IMPORTANT-Projects-blockchain/memory/MEMORY.md first to avoid duplicates. Memory types: user (preferences, knowledge), feedback (corrections, confirmed approaches -- include WHY), project (decisions, deadlines), reference (external pointers). NOT worth saving: anything derivable from code or git history."}'
